figures.caption: FIGURE 4. Fine-tuning a CNN model on MNIST classification with varied privacy budget ε. The ExpM-Quad feasible radius is fixed at R = 0.1. For ExpM-Quad, each curve shows the mean accuracy over 500 randomly drawn candidate models; shaded regions denote ±1 standard deviation.

FIGURE 3. Fine-tuning a CNN model on MNIST classification with varied privacy budget ε. The ExpM-Quad projected dimension is fixed at p̃ = 400. For ExpM-Quad, each curve shows the mean accuracy over 500 randomly drawn candidate models; shaded regions denote ±1 standard deviation.

FIGURE 1. Fine-tuning an MLP on the sinusoidal regression problem with varied privacy budget ε. The ExpM-Quad projected dimension is fixed at p̃ = 20. For ExpM-Quad, each curve shows the mean loss value over 500 randomly drawn candidate models; shaded regions denote ±1 standard deviation.

FIGURE 2. Fine-tuning an MLP on the sinusoidal regression problem with varied privacy budget ε. The ExpM-Quad feasible radius is fixed at R = 0.1. For ExpM-Quad, each curve shows the mean loss value over 500 randomly drawn candidate models; shaded regions denote ±1 standard deviation.
FIGURE 5. Fine-tuning a linear model on MIMIC-IV mortality prediction with varied privacy budget ε. The ExpM-Quad projected dimension is fixed at p̃ = 20.
FIGURE 6. Fine-tuning a linear model on MIMIC-IV mortality prediction with varied privacy budget ε. The ExpM-Quad feasible radius is fixed at R = 0.1
